data.name: Icon1
data.value: [base64 mime encoded string representing a byte array form of the .NET Framework object]

data.name: CompleteInviteText1
data.value: Supply the information to create your own Resgrid account and join

data.name: CompleteInviteText2
data.value: The information you are supplying is used to create your account in Resgrid. If you already have an account your existing account will be linked with the department as part of this invite.

data.name: CompleteInviteText3
data.value: If you are having trouble completing the invite or are running into issues, please reach out to the Administrator of the department for the invite you are trying to complete for assistance. They can manually add your account if necessary.

data.name: InviteCompletedInfo
data.value: It looks this invite has already been completed. If this is in error contact your department or origination to get another invite, else you can log in with your username or password.

data.name: InviteCompletedNotice
data.value: Resgrid Invite has already been completed

data.name: LockedOutText
data.value: This account has been locked out, please try and log in again in 30 minutes. Please note support cannot unlock an account for you.

data.name: LoginMessage1
data.value: Enter your username and password to login.

data.name: LoginMessage2
data.value: If your department has already signed up ask that departments admin for an invite.

data.name: LoginMessage3
data.value: If your department has not yet signed up for Resgrid you can create a new account which will create the department for you.

data.name: LoginMessage4
data.value: Maintenance is performed weekly on Saturday starting at 2000 hours Pacific.

data.name: MissingInviteBody
data.value: We're sorry but we were unable to locate your invite to Resgrid. Try having your department or organization send another one. If you already have a Resgrid account you can log in below.

data.name: MissingInviteTopText
data.value: Unable to find your Resgrid Invite

data.name: PasswordHelp
data.value: Passwords must be 8 characters or longer and include a digit (number), an uppercase and lowercase letter

data.name: RecoverAccountSuccess
data.value: If your email address is valid we have reset your password and sent your username and new password to the email address supplied. Email delivery can be delayed up to 15 minutes, also check your spam or junk areas in your email client if you email doesn't arrive by then.

data.name: RecoverAccountText
data.value: Supply the email address you used with your Resgrid account. We will then send you an email to that address with your username and new password to log into the system.

data.name: RegisterText1
data.value: Registering for Resgrid is as easy as 1,2,3!

data.name: RegisterText2
data.value: Have one person from your org fill out this form

data.name: RegisterText3
data.value: Once Signed up, you can invite or add people from the Personnel page inside the app

data.name: RegisterText4
data.value: Thats it! Only a single person needs to Register the organization

data.name: RegisterText5
data.value: If someone in your organization already has an account with Resgrid have them invite you to their department instead of creating a new one, if you want to use Resgrid with them.
